name: 暗影双匕（★） | 狩猎网格
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 狩猎网格
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been spray-painted using mesh fencing and cardboard cutouts as stencils. A predator is a predator, no matter the environment
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器以围住的网格和纸板切口为漏字板进行了喷漆。 不管环境怎么变，弱肉强食的法则永远不会改变
